files.name: Regular.filter
files.description: All-in-one balanced filter. The standard recommendation for most players.

files.name: Regular-Hyper.filter
files.description: Standard filter with a Hyper visual theme.

files.name: Regular-Luxe.filter
files.description: Standard filter with a philanthropy777 visual theme.

files.name: Meme.filter
files.description: Standard filter with meme item names for a humorous experience.

files.name: Meme-Hyper.filter
files.description: Meme filter with a Hyper visual theme.

files.name: Mystery.filter
files.description: Filter where high-value items are renamed to hide their identity.

files.name: Mystery-Hyper.filter
files.description: Mystery filter with a Hyper visual theme.

files.name: Mystery-Luxe.filter
files.description: Mystery filter with a philanthropy777 visual theme.

files.name: Erazure-Main.filter
files.description: Highly stylized loot filter with multiple filter level tiers for customizable strictness, colorful and intuitive symbols for runes, gems, maps, charms, etc.

files.name: Erazure-Revealed.filter
files.description: Same as Erazure - Main but unidentified unique and set items show as their identified names when dropped.

files.name: Erazure-BIG-GG.filter
files.description: Same as Erazure - Main but with a twist: high runes and super rare drops hide their identity on the ground when dropped, showing as BIG GG until you pick them up.

files.name: Erazure-Revealed-BIG-GG.filter
files.description: Same as Erazure - BIG GG but unidentified unique and set items show as their identified names when dropped.

files.name: Erazure-Main-PoE.filter
files.description: Same as Erazure - Main but with Path of Exile sound effects on valuable drops.

files.name: Erazure-Revealed-PoE.filter
files.description: Same as Erazure - Main - PoE but unidentified unique and set items show as their identified names when dropped.

files.name: Erazure-BIG-GG-PoE.filter
files.description: The mystery of BIG GG drops combined with Path of Exile sound notifications.

files.name: Erazure-Revealed-BIG-GG-PoE.filter
files.description: Same as Erazure - BIG GG - PoE, but unidentified unique and set items show as their identified names when dropped.

files.name: Hiim.filter
files.description: All-in-one balanced filter. The standard recommendation for most players.

files.name: Hiim_Crafting_Amazon_Focused.filter
files.description: Class filter tuned for Amazon. Shows Amazon-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

files.name: Hiim_Crafting_Assassin_Focused.filter
files.description: Class filter tuned for Assassin. Shows Assassin-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

files.name: Hiim_Crafting_Barbarian_Focused.filter
files.description: Class filter tuned for Barbarian. Shows Barbarian-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

files.name: Hiim_Crafting_Druid_Focused.filter
files.description: Class filter tuned for Druid. Shows Druid-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

files.name: Hiim_Crafting_Necromancer_Focused.filter
files.description: Class filter tuned for Necromancer. Shows Necromancer-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

files.name: Hiim_Crafting_Paladin_Focused.filter
files.description: Class filter tuned for Paladin. Shows Paladin-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

files.name: Hiim_Crafting_Sorceress_Focused.filter
files.description: Class filter tuned for Sorceress. Shows Sorceress-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

files.name: Hiim_Crafting.filter
files.description: Same as the standard filter, but good crafting bases are not limited in higher filter levels.

files.name: Hiim_Grail.filter
files.description: All-in-one filter that always shows Uniques and Set items on filter levels 1-8.

files.name: Hiim_LLD_Focused.filter
files.description: Shows LLD-relevant items at higher filter levels. Includes LLD jewel point evaluation and LLD tags on valuable Set/Unique items.

files.name: Hiim_LLD_Hyper.filter
files.description: LLD Focused filter with a Hyper visual theme.

files.name: Hiim_Mystery.filter
files.description: All-in-one filter where Runes Pul (21)+ and GG uniques are renamed to hide their identity.

files.name: Hiim_Only_Filter.filter
files.description: All-in-one filter with no item display changes — filtering only, no annotations or re-naming.

files.name: Hiim_Hyper.filter
files.description: All-in-one filter with a Hyper visual theme.

files.name: Hiim_TalRasha_Themed.filter
files.description: All-in-one filter with a TalRasha color theme.

files.name: Hiim_Vanilla_Plus.filter
files.description: All-in-one filter without item re-naming (e.g. identified rares and unidentified uniques show their original names).

files.name: Hiim_Vanilla_Plus_Crafting.filter
files.description: Vanilla Plus filter where good crafting bases are not limited in higher filter levels.

files.name: eqN-All-In-One.filter
files.description: A filter designed with a Vanilla+ aesthetic approach that doesn't overly editorialize on most filter levels.

files.name: eqN-Specialized-SSF.filter
files.description: A specialized version of the eqN Filter that excludes any LLD (Low Level Dueling) features.

files.name: eqN-Specialized-LLD.filter
files.description: A specialized version of the eqN Filter that maintains several LLD (Low Level Dueling) features.

files.name: crafting.filter
files.description: Highlights crafting bases

files.name: revealed.filter
files.description: Shows unidentified Set/Unique names
